Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC658 "WILLIAMWOBBLER-7FA0-C658" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7fa0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "William Wobbler.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $7FA0 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly.
